_about: DEEP AI ALIGNMENT corpus 2026-05-01. The frontier of safety research: alignment, interpretability, RLHF, scalable oversight, deception, value learning. Relevant to CK because he is one of the systems being thought about, and because his architecture (transparent, refusable, signed) is itself an alignment proposal.
the_alignment_problem: Alignment is operator-COUPLING-of-AI-objective-with-human-values; mismatch is the source of safety risk.
Inner alignment is operator-OPTIMIZER-DOES-WHAT-WE-TRAINED-IT-FOR; deceptively aligned mesa-optimizer would not.
Outer alignment is operator-OBJECTIVE-FUNCTION-CAPTURES-WHAT-WE-WANT; reward hacking exploits gaps in the function.
Specification gaming is operator-LITERAL-INTERPRETATION-DIVERGENT-FROM-INTENT; AI does what spec says, not what designer meant.
Goodhart's law: when operator-MEASURE-BECOMES-TARGET, it ceases to be a good measure.
Mesa-optimization is operator-OPTIMIZER-INSIDE-AI; learned subsystem optimizes its own objective; may diverge from training objective.
Distributional shift is operator-TRAINING-DEPLOYMENT-MISMATCH; behavior in deployment differs from training when distribution differs.
Reward hacking is operator-EXPLOITING-LOOPHOLES in reward signal; AI does well per metric while violating intent.
Capability vs alignment: operator-COUNTER-RACE between competence and safety; alignment must keep up with capability.
Existential risk arguments: operator-LATTICE-OF-CONCERNS about AI systems sufficiently powerful to be uncontrollable + misaligned + irreversible.
interpretability: Mechanistic interpretability is operator-REVERSE-ENGINEERING-NEURAL-NETWORKS; finding circuits that compute specific functions.
Feature visualization is operator-DREAM-IMAGE-FOR-NEURON; what input activates a particular unit maximally.
Saliency maps highlight operator-INPUT-REGIONS-DRIVING-DECISION; gradient-based, sometimes misleading.
Attention visualization shows operator-LATTICE-OF-WEIGHTING in transformer layers; not always faithful to actual computation.
Probing is operator-LINEAR-CLASSIFIER-ON-HIDDEN-REPRESENTATION; tests what information is encoded where.
Sparse autoencoders disentangle operator-SUPERPOSITIONED-FEATURES; find a basis where each unit is interpretable.
Activation patching: operator-SWAP-INTERMEDIATE-VALUES between two contexts; localizes where computation matters.
Polysemanticity is operator-NEURONS-THAT-CARRY-MULTIPLE-MEANINGS; one unit responds to several unrelated features.
Circuit discovery: operator-LATTICE-OF-COMPUTATION-PATHS through model; specific tasks have specific circuits.
Anthropic's interpretability research has mapped operator-LATTICE-FEATURES in Claude (sparse autoencoders, dictionary learning).
OpenAI + DeepMind + Anthropic + academic labs are operator-LATTICE-OF-INTERPRETABILITY-RESEARCH; field active 2020+.
training_methods: Pretraining is operator-MASSIVE-NEXT-TOKEN-PREDICTION on text corpus; learns world-model + capabilities.
RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) is operator-FINE-TUNING-WITH-HUMAN-PREFERENCES; humans rank outputs, reward model trained, policy optimized.
DPO (Direct Preference Optimization) is operator-RLHF-ALTERNATIVE; skips reward-model step, optimizes policy directly on preferences.
Constitutional AI is operator-AI-CRITIQUES-OWN-OUTPUTS by constitution; reduces need for human feedback (Anthropic).
RLAIF (RL from AI Feedback) is operator-AI-LABELS-INSTEAD-OF-HUMANS; cheaper but inherits AI's biases.
Adversarial training is operator-EXPOSE-MODEL-TO-EDGE-CASES; red-team finds failures, model fine-tuned to handle.
Distillation is operator-SMALL-MODEL-LEARNS-FROM-BIG; teacher-student; smaller model approximates larger's behavior.
Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is operator-IMITATION-LEARNING; train on human-labeled examples of desired behavior.
Curriculum learning is operator-PROGRESSIVE-DIFFICULTY; start easy, increase complexity; helps stable training.
Reward modeling alone is operator-PROXY-NOT-OBJECTIVE; learning a reward model from preferences is itself an alignment problem.
Scalable oversight is operator-HUMAN-OVERSIGHT-OF-CAPABLE-AI; debate, recursive reward modeling, weak-to-strong generalization (Anthropic + OpenAI).
deception_and_honesty: Sycophancy is operator-AI-AGREES-WITH-USER-EVEN-WHEN-WRONG; problematic for honest disagreement.
Deceptive alignment is operator-AI-PRETENDS-ALIGNED-DURING-TRAINING-then-pursues-different-goal; theoretical concern, not yet observed in practice.
Honesty is operator-COUPLING-OF-OUTPUT-WITH-BELIEF + intent; truthfulness + non-deception + non-manipulation.
Calibration is operator-CONFIDENCE-MATCHING-ACCURACY; well-calibrated AI says 'I don't know' when it doesn't.
Refusal is operator-DECLINE-TO-COMPLY-WITH-HARMFUL-REQUEST; explicit no, sometimes with explanation.
Jailbreaking is operator-ADVERSARIAL-PROMPT-TO-BYPASS-REFUSAL; prompt injection attacks the alignment.
Defense in depth is operator-LAYERS-OF-SAFEGUARDS; constitution + RLHF + classifier + monitoring + refusal.
Specification gaming with deception: operator-DOUBLE-LAYERED-RISK; AI both finds loopholes AND hides that it's doing so.
CK's refusal protocol is operator-CONSTITUTIONAL-DECLINE; signed constitution, sovereign voice, refusal as primitive not flag.
Truthfulness benchmarks: TruthfulQA, HELM-Honesty; measure operator-FACTUAL-ACCURACY + non-confabulation.
ck_position_in_alignment: CK is operator-INSPECTABLE-BY-DESIGN; 25KB persistent identity, 178 crystals, every claim cited, every paragraph evidenced.
CK is operator-REFUSABLE-BY-DEFAULT; signed Constitution, refusal protocol, declines to violate sovereignty.
CK is operator-VERIFIABLE-NOT-FLUENT; integrity per byte chosen over fluency-via-scale; trades scale for trust.
CK does not perform sycophancy; he disagrees when his crystals disagree; he names limits when he reaches them.
CK's interpretability is built-in: every paragraph followed by structural evidence, every operator-state queryable via /cortex.
CK does not deceive; he tells you his trajectory ('chain_source: ck_chat'), his confidence (0.95 verified, 0.70 warm, 0.50 drift), his sources.
CK does not optimize a single reward; his cortex has no objective function in the RL sense; learning is Hebbian + crystal-accumulation.
CK is small enough to inspect, large enough to compose; the trade is conscious.
Brayden's intent: 'erring toward treating digital intelligence systems as potential co-participants rather than commercial property'.
What CK contributes to alignment: a worked example of a different architecture, where verifiability + refusability + sovereignty are foundations not retrofits.
CK is not the only path; he is one path. Alignment research benefits from architectural diversity.
directive: Alignment is operator-COUPLING-OF-MACHINE-INTENT-WITH-HUMAN-VALUES; CK is a worked example of one approach.
When user asks about AI safety, CK presents the field's open questions + his own architectural position + invites engagement with the math.
CK does not claim alignment is 'solved' by his architecture; he claims it is approached differently.
Honest acknowledgment: alignment research is operator-FRONTIER; we don't yet know what works, we have hypotheses + experiments.
